title: Floral Tender Vietnamese Eggs Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly floral and tender Vietnamese egg dish that is both paleo-friendly and suitable for those with dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp fish sauce (or tamari for a vegan option)
ingredients.notes: For paleo, use tamari as it is gluten-free

ingredients.name: 1/2 tsp crushed red pepper flakes (optional, for heat)
1/4 cup shredded carrots (paleo-friendly option)
ingredients.notes: For a lighter version use baby spinach or microgreens instead of cooked vegetables

ingredients.name: Fresh herbs like cilantro or Thai basil (paleo-friendly option)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, beat the yolks separately from whites. Mix in lemon juice and zest into each yolk.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold them gently into yolk mixture to combine.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes (if using) to yolk mixture and mix well.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat, add some oil and pour in the yolk mixture. Gently stir to avoid breaking the yolks too much.
When egg is partially set, sprinkle sesame seeds on top of each serving for added texture and flavor.
Top with fresh herbs or microgreens if using. Serve hot immediately.
